# Brew outdated report

Generated by `.github/workflows/update-brew.yml` on 2026-06-15.

### machine_type=personal



### machine_type=work


Most formulae in the Brewfile are unpinned (latest stable), so a normal `brew bundle install` picks new versions automatically — this PR exists as a heads-up, not a required bump. Bump pins explicitly only when stability matters.
